title: melanthesa reclinata
intro: Melanthesa reclinata, also known as the African bush tea or round-leafed mountain tea, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in South African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Melanthesa reclinata include reducing fever, relieving headaches and sore throats, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Melanthesa reclinata can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or tea, and it is often used as a natural remedy in traditional African medicine.
